clinical_blockers: No exact UAE clinician guideline for undifferentiated pediatric ear pain was identified.
External-ear, trauma, foreign-body, hearing, detailed otoscopy, and broad ear-pain content is not fully covered by the acute-otitis-media source.
Medication and antibiotic choices remain unsupported clinician-entered content.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
